top_signals.title: Kenya Inflation Heats Up After Iran-Driven Fuel Hikes Fan Unrest
top_signals.summary: Kenya’s inflation rate rose by the most in more than two years, after higher fuel costs driven by the war in Iran added to price pressures and spurred deadly protests last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Quarter of Big Oil Tankers Trapped by Iran War Have Escaped - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Quarter of Big Oil Tankers Trapped by Iran War Have Escaped  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Paves Way for Onshore Crypto-Linked Perpetual Futures
top_signals.summary: The main US derivatives regulator said perpetual futures contracts for cryptocurrencies could trade on registered onshore platforms if they meet certain conditions, bringing to America a popular trading instrument that has until now existed almost entirely overseas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CFTC opens door for crypto perpetual future contracts in US as Coinbase, Kalshi move forward
top_signals.summary: The CFTC opened the doors for perpetual futures contracts, giving way for Kalshi and Coinbase to offer those products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BOJ will probably raise rates in June, former board member says
top_signals.summary: The central bank's policy will fall into a state of being behind otherwise, says Makoto Sakurai, who served on its board from 2016 to 2021.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A City-Backed Grocery Store in Atlanta Offers a Model for Mamdani
top_signals.summary:
Food prices have become the animating issue in one of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s signature policies: a plan to open city-owned grocery stores.

Azalea Fresh Market's CEO Paul Nair joins Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith on the Everybody's Business podcast to discuss the popular city-backed grocery store in Atlanta and how it's serving as a model for Mamdani’s grocery store plan.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Petra Begins Finsch Mine Rescue Plan Amid Diamond Market Slump
top_signals.summary: Petra Diamonds Ltd. is putting one of its two mines into a business restructuring process and is considering job cuts across the rest of the company, as falling diamond prices and a strong rand erode earnings and liquidity.
